items.description:

It's great for the coolest outfits that want awesome luxury sparkly diamonds look along with a magic glow crystal . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / Y2K / retro or any style -- wear this epic necklace . The amulet / gem part of this necklace has a summer ombre effect .

items.name: Classy
